name: Green Beans with Warm Bacon Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound green beans, trimmed, cut into 2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender, about 8 minutes. Drain.
2. Transfer the cooked green beans to a shallow bowl.
3. Meanwhile, cook the bacon in a medium skillet over medium heat until crisp, about 8 minutes. Drain on paper towel.
4. Add the shallot to the skillet and sauté for 30 seconds.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Stir the vinegar into the shallot mixture in the skillet. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Pour the warm dressing over the green beans and toss to coat.
8. Crumble the bacon over the greens.
